caption:
I mean seriously, buy yourself a yukata when you come to Japan 🙌😂 or you already have one? It is so comfy, especially during summer ☺️

My favourite festivals:
🏮Nara Tokae - Aug 5 -14
🏮Gozan-no-Okuribi or Daimonji in Kyoto - Aug 16
🏮 Yukata festival in Himeji - June 24,25 
🏮Hassaku Festival at Matsuo Taisha Shrine in Kyoto - Sep 3
